subject: Re: news-magnani
body:
of course

--- Manuela Stï¿½tter <mstoetter@hotmail.com> wrote:

> Dear Jeffrey,
> 
> first of all let me wish you a fantastic 2006. How
> have you been? How was 
> Little Sain Jeff during the holiday?
> 
> Sorry I didn't contact you before but as you
> probably know I went to Italy 
> for all December. I'm back now in the city....today
> is my first day working 
> at Assouline.....let me thank you again for bringing
> me to NY one year and a 
> half ago.
> 
> Last week I went to doctor Magnani, the dentist, and
> he asked me about you. 
> He sends you many greatings.
> 
> I went there for the usual cleaning and I also had a
> small small cavity that 
> they filled.
> 
> Sorry if I ask you this, Jeffrey, and plase let me
> know what you think 
> about:
> You sent me the first time to Magnani and this time
> I went there thinking to 
> pay for my bill (that you have normally paid when I
> worked for you).
> When he presented me the invoice I was very
> surprised to see that it was 
> about $450,00.
> 
> As you know I just started working and if I had
> imagined that the price 
> would have been so high I wouldn't had gone there
> but somewhere else....
> 
> Can I ask you to help me paying for that?....I will
> pay the amout that you 
> think is reasonable and for now on I will look for
> someone else less 
> expensive.
> 
> Let me know what do you think.
> 
> By the way....now that I work I will have less time
> to come to the office 
> and bring you home made cookies.....but I can
> definitelly come sometimes 
> during the w-e or in the evening....at your
> convinience.
> 
> Hope you are doing well as usually.
> 
> miss you
> 
> manu
> 
> 
>

body_html:
of course

--- Manuela Stï¿½tter mstoetter@hotmail.com wrote:

Dear Jeffrey,

first of all let me wish you a fantastic 2006. How
have you been? How was
Little Sain Jeff during the holiday?

Sorry I didn't contact you before but as you
probably know I went to Italy
for all December. I'm back now in the city....today
is my first day working
at Assouline.....let me thank you again for bringing
me to NY one year and a
half ago.

Last week I went to doctor Magnani, the dentist, and
he asked me about you.
He sends you many greatings.

I went there for the usual cleaning and I also had a
small small cavity that
they filled.

Sorry if I ask you this, Jeffrey, and plase let me
know what you think
about:
You sent me the first time to Magnani and this time
I went there thinking to
pay for my bill (that you have normally paid when I
worked for you).
When he presented me the invoice I was very
surprised to see that it was
about $450,00.

As you know I just started working and if I had
imagined that the price
would have been so high I wouldn't had gone there
but somewhere else....

Can I ask you to help me paying for that?....I will
pay the amout that you
think is reasonable and for now on I will look for
someone else less
expensive.

Let me know what do you think.

By the way....now that I work I will have less time
to come to the office
and bring you home made cookies.....but I can
definitelly come sometimes
during the w-e or in the evening....at your
convinience.

Hope you are doing well as usually.

miss you

manu
